stories.title: Sources: Brown heading to Philly in blockbuster
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown has a new home, with the Celtics agreeing to send their longtime star to the 76ers for Paul George, two first-round picks (2028, '31) and two second-round selections, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Wednesday.

stories.title: Changing the narrative: It’s time for U.S. to show...
stories.summary: At a World Cup on home soil, the USMNT boasts a world-class coach and star players in their primes. This is its chance to make its mark on world soccer.

stories.title: Scouting: Bosnia and Herzegovina's set pieces will...
stories.summary: The U.S. has already succeeded against defensive-minded opponents, but will that continue in the last 32 against Bosnia and Herzegovina?

stories.title: Pulisic returns to USMNT lineup to face Bosnia
stories.summary: Christian Pulisic was named to the USMNT's starting lineup for Wednesday's World Cup round-of-32 clash with Bosnia-Herzegovina after recovering from a calf injury.

stories.title: Belgium pull off stunning rally, eliminate Senegal...
stories.summary: Youri Tielemans scored from the penalty spot in stoppage time of extra time, and Belgium came back from two goals down to beat Senegal 3-2 Wednesday in the Round of 32 at the World Cup.
